author: lOrm
content: #664 closed. Added managed/policy skill layer in src/skills.rs. New constants: OPENCLAUDIA_MANAGED_PATH env var (points at admin config root; subdir /skills contributes policy skills) and OPENCLAUDIA_DISABLE_POLICY_SKILLS env var (set non-empty to suppress). skill_dirs() now prepends the managed dir so policy skills win on name collision against project/user skills. 1 unit test pins the disable-env suppression contract.
